Title: EPIC: Data & Observability Foundation (Week 1)
Description: Build event tracking, ingestion, and internal KPI dashboards to make decisions from real usage data.

Title: EPIC: Creator Onboarding & Publishing Core (Week 2)
Description: Reduce writer onboarding friction and harden draft/publish so new writers can ship first content quickly.

Title: EPIC: Reader Discovery Core (Week 3)
Description: Improve reader discovery using curated rails, ranking, and practical search/filter capabilities.

Title: EPIC: Follow & Notification Loop (Week 4)
Description: Create return loops with follow and new chapter notifications.

Title: EPIC: Writer Analytics & Retention Tools (Week 5)
Description: Deliver analytics that help writers improve publishing cadence and content performance.

Title: EPIC: Trust, Safety, Moderation (Week 6)
Description: Establish report and moderation workflows with SLA and auditability.

Title: EPIC: Monetization MVP (Week 7)
Description: Launch premium chapter unlock, wallet ledger, and payment reconciliation.

Title: EPIC: Optimization & Launch Readiness (Week 8)
Description: Improve performance, run experiments, and prepare launch runbooks.
